input.command:
CMI=~/Library/Application\ Support/CityModInstaller
echo "=== CityModInstaller/config.json ==="
cat "$CMI/config.json" 2>/dev/null
echo
echo "=== modder.db config table (does it point at the game?) ==="
sqlite3 "$CMI/modder.db" "SELECT name, value FROM config;" 2>/dev/null || echo "  (locked/empty)"
echo
echo "=== installed mods so far ==="
sqlite3 "$CMI/modder.db" "SELECT id,name FROM installedMods;" 2>/dev/null; echo "  count: $(sqlite3 "$CMI/modder.db" 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM installedMods;' 2>/dev/null)"
echo "  tracked files: $(sqlite3 "$CMI/modder.db" 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trackedFiles;' 2>/dev/null)"
echo
echo "=== launcher.log — key lines (paths, game detection, errors) ==="
grep -iE 'game|coh|assets|pigg|path|found|install|error|fail' "$CMI/launcher.log" 2>/dev/null | tail -25
echo
echo "=== game's assets/mods drop point — current contents ==="
ls -la ~/Library/Application\ Support/LaunchCat/coh/assets/mods/ 2>/dev/null || echo "  (mods dir empty or absent)"
input.description: Check if modding tool is wired to the game install
